MINI MINUTES: Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Bruce Devisser is present.
Attorney Marina Franco for the plaintiff.
Defendant Frank Garvey is present.
Attorney Christopher Tirrell appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.502, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of Sep. 29, 2014 is vacated.
